channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Tillis drops, Warsh moves up: Fed chair vote tightens as DOJ probe closes. Warsh eyes independence, crypto stakes rise. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/tillis-ends-warsh-fed-chair-block #Crypto #Fed #Policy

item.title: Aave pushes Arbitrum to unfreeze $73M of stolen ETH to back rsETH after the Kelp hack. Will governance approve DeFi United funding? 🔒💥 https:// Blockchain.News/news/aave-arbit... https://Blockchain.News/news/aave-arbitrum-unfreeze-eth-kelp-dao-hack #DeFi #Aave #Arbitrum

item.title: Bitcoin could bottom near $57K by Oct 2026. 🫢 If history repeats, the pullback may press BTC below key supports. https://Blockchain.News/news/bitcoin-bottom-57k-october-2026 #Bitcoin #CryptoNews #MarketWatch
